subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! In all conditions thou hast been and art remembered before the Wronged One. Thou art numbered among those souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی در جمیع احوال نزد مظلوم مذکور بوده و هستی تو از نفوسی محسوبی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
